name: Coffee
description: Brewed two days ago, this cup o' joe is still strong enough to wake the dead.

name: Busch Apple
description: Canned college student piss on a fall day.

name: Natty Light
description: The cheapest you could find at the gas station.

name: Pabst Blue Ribbon
description: The can is cold, the beer is cold, and the taste is... well, it's beer.

name: Beck's
description: A crisp German pilsner that tastes like the first good decision you've made all week.

name: Paulaner Hefe-Weissbier
description: Cloudy, bready, and suspiciously classy for a fishing trip.
